data.content: Implementation review: code quality is good, tests pass (127/127), typecheck clean. However the feature branch (worktree-agent-a4bb9b38) has merge conflicts with main due to commits 1f87cecc and f22ad2fe (config permissions) landing on main after the branch diverged. Needs rebase onto main and conflict resolution in doctor-applyfix.test.ts, doctor.test.ts, registry.test.ts, doctor.ts, and registry.ts before it can be merged.
